name: Pour La France Chocolate Decadence
recipeIngredient: Raspberry Sauce (8 oz fresh or frozen raspberries. Thaw if frozen)
2 tsp Liqueur such as Grand Marnier, Chambord, or dry Marsala
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and chocolate together over very low heat, stirring constantly.
2. Set aside to cool.
3. Whip eggs with an electric mixer until they reach full volume (approximately 7 minutes).
4. Carefully fold in the chocolate mixture, sugar, and flour.
5. Pour batter into a greased and lined 10-inch cake pan.
6. Bake in a preheated 325-degree oven for 30 minutes. Do not overbake.
7. Cool completely to room temperature before removing from the pan.
8. To serve, spoon whipped cream on top of sliced Chocolate Decadence.
9. Top with a spoonful of Raspberry Sauce.
